{{Quote|Wha— who sent you? The Prefect? He would never do that! Liar!|Harbo Linn, to an Imperial operative|<ref name="AED" />}}
'''Harbo Linn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] Inquisitorius during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Eugene Talmont]] panicked, and ordered his Imperial operative to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Inquisitor Linn to prevent an investigation into Talmont's affairs.<ref name="AED" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:PirateCaptainMaleTemplate.jpg|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Harbo Linn]]
Benton was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="AED" />
